# Hash-pinned lockfile for the bundled Python engine runtime.
# GENERATED — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with scripts/lock-python-deps.ps1
# after changing scripts/python-requirements.in. Installed by
# setup-python-embed.ps1 via `pip install --require-hashes -r`, so every
# transitive dependency (cryptography, lxml, …) is version- and hash-locked,
# not floated at build time. Resolved for CPython 3.14 / Windows x86_64.
#
